creates.label: personal data collection
comments: The 'personal data collection' is not explicitly mentioned in the source text. However, we consider it an implication of collecting personal data, that 'personal data collection' is created. It is this 'personal data collection' that is further processed and ultimately erased.

snippets.text: Personal data shall be:

label: personal data are processed lawfully, fairly and in a transparent manner

snippets.text: processed lawfully, fairly and in a transparent manner in relation to the data subject (‘lawfulness, fairness and transparency’)

label: personal data are collected for specified, explicit and legitimate purposes
fact: personal data are collected for specified, explicit and legitimate purposes (‘purpose limitation’)

snippets.text: collected for specified, explicit and legitimate purposes and not further processed in a manner that is incompatible with those purposes

label: personal data are adequate, relevant and limited to what is necessary
fact: personal data are adequate, relevant and limited to what is necessary in relation to the purposes for which they are processed (‘data minimisation’)

label: personal data are kept no longer than necessary
fact: personal data are kept in a form which permits identification of data subjects for no longer than is necessary for the purposes for which the personal data are processed (‘storage limitation’)

fact: personal data are processed in a manner that ensures appropriate security of the personal data (‘integrity and confidentiality’)
